deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription:
This action cannot be undone. The following data will be deleted:

• Active subscription (canceled immediately, remaining period forfeited)
• Your owned fanmarks (will be returned and enter grace period)
• Favorites and notification settings
• Profile information

License history will be retained, but your username will be displayed as "Deleted User".
deleteAccount.successDescription: Thank you for using our service.
deleteAccount.errorDescription: An error occurred while deleting your account. Please try again later.
deleteAccount.subscriptionWarningDescription: Your current subscription will be canceled immediately, and the remaining period (approximately {daysLeft} days) will be forfeited.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.introduction: fanmark.id ("we", "us", "our", or "Service") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website and services.

informationWeCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.content:
We collect information in several ways:

• Account Information: When you create an account, we collect your email address, password (hashed), display name, and avatar image.

• Fanmark Data: Information about your emoji combinations (fanmarks) you create, including display names, access types, redirect URLs, and associated profile information.

• Usage Data: We collect information about how you interact with our Service, including search queries, access patterns, and actions taken.

• Communication Data: If you contact us, we may retain your messages and communications.

• Technical Data: We collect IP addresses, browser type, operating system, and device information through cookies and similar technologies.

howWeUseYourInformation.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
howWeUseYourInformation.content:
We use the information we collect to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve our Service
• Create and manage your account
• Process fanmark registrations, extensions, and returns
• Send transactional emails (confirmations, resets, notifications)
• Monitor and analyze service usage and trends
• Detect, prevent, and address fraud and security issues
• Comply with legal obligations
• Communicate with you about service updates and changes

dataSharing.title: 3. Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.content:
We do not sell your personal data. We may share information:

• With Service Providers: Third-party vendors who help operate our Service (hosting, email, analytics)
• For Legal Reasons: When required by law or to protect our rights
• Public Fanmark Data: Your fanmark and associated profile information may be visible to the public based on your privacy settings
• Anonymized Data: We may share aggregated, anonymized data for analytics and research

dataRetention.title: 4. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal data as long as your account is active and for a reasonable period afterward to comply with legal obligations. You can request deletion of your account, which will remove most personal data, though some information may be retained for legal or operational purposes.

security.title: 5. Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure authentication, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, remember preferences, and analyze usage patterns. You can control cookie settings through your browser. Some features may not work properly if cookies are disabled.

childrenPrivacy.title: 7. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: Our Service is not intended for individuals under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If we learn that we have collected such information, we will take steps to delete it promptly.

yourRights.title: 8. Your Privacy Rights
yourRights.content:
Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

• Access: Request access to your personal data
• Correction: Request correction of inaccurate data
• Deletion: Request deletion of your data
• Portability: Request a copy of your data in a structured format
• Opt-out: Unsubscribe from marketing communications

To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@fanmark.id

thirdPartyLinks.title: 9. Third-Party Links
thirdPartyLinks.content: Our Service may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party sites. Please review their privacy policies before providing personal information.

changesTopolicy.title: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changesTopolicy.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new Privacy Policy and updating the "Last updated" date. Continued use of the Service indicates your acceptance of the updated policy.

contactUs.title: 11. Contact Us
contactUs.content:
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:

Email: privacy@fanmark.id

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.introduction: These Terms of Service ("Terms", "Agreement") form a legally binding contract between you ("User", "you", "your") and fanmark.id ("Company", "we", "us", "our"). By accessing or using fanmark.id, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

useAgreement.title: 1. Use Agreement
useAgreement.content:
You agree to use fanmark.id only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe upon the rights of others or restrict their use and enjoyment of fanmark.id. Prohibited behavior includes:

• Harassing or causing distress or inconvenience to any person
• Obscene or offensive content
• Disrupting the normal flow of dialogue within fanmark.id
• Registering fanmarks for spam, phishing, or malicious purposes
• Violating intellectual property rights
• Unauthorized access or data collection

accountResponsibility.title: 2. Account and Registration
accountResponsibility.content:
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate, complete, and current information during registration. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

Invitation Code: Access to fanmark.id may require an invitation code. Invitation codes are non-transferable and can be revoked at any time.

fanmarkRights.title: 3. Fanmark Ownership and Rights
fanmarkRights.content:
Each fanmark (emoji combination) has ownership limitations:

• You may own multiple fanmarks up to your plan limit
• Fanmarks are granted on a license basis for specified periods
• You retain rights to content you create (profiles, messages, etc.)
• The Company retains all rights to the fanmark platform, technology, and infrastructure
• You may not transfer, sell, or sublicense fanmarks without explicit permission
• Unused fanmarks may enter a grace period before becoming available to others

fanmarkRetention.title: 4. Fanmark License Terms
fanmarkRetention.content:
Fanmark licenses are subject to:

• License Period: Initial license duration varies by fanmark tier (1-5 emojis)
• Perpetual Licenses: Fanmarks with 4+ emojis receive perpetual, non-expiring licenses (may be subject to future changes)
• Paid Fanmarks: Premium fanmarks (1-3 emojis) require renewal through our payment system
• License Renewal: You may extend licenses before expiration
• Grace Period: Upon expiration, a grace period allows renewal before the fanmark becomes available to others
• Return: You may voluntarily return a fanmark at any time

paymentTerms.title: 5. Payment and Billing
paymentTerms.content:
Some fanmarks require payment for licensing:

• Pricing: Prices are displayed before purchase and may change with notice
• Payment Processing: Payments are processed through Stripe and subject to their terms
• Billing: You authorize us to charge your payment method for renewal fees
• No Refunds: License fees are non-refundable except as required by law
• Failed Payments: Failure to pay may result in suspension or revocation of licenses
• Tax: You are responsible for any applicable taxes

userContent.title: 6. User Content
userContent.content:
You grant fanmark.id a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, and display your user-generated content (profiles, messages, avatars, etc.) for providing and improving the Service.

• You retain ownership of your content
• You warrant that your content does not infringe on third-party rights
• You are solely responsible for the content you create
• We may remove content that violates these Terms

intellectualProperty.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The Service, including all code, design, features, and functionality, is owned by fanmark.id. All intellectual property rights are reserved. You may not reproduce, distribute, or transmit the Service or its content without permission.

limitationOfLiability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.content:
TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW:

• The Service is provided on an "as-is" basis without warranties of any kind
• We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages
• Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid in the past 12 months
• Some jurisdictions do not allow liability limitations, which may not apply to you

disclaimers.title: 9. Disclaimers
disclaimers.content:
• We make no warranties regarding the Service's uninterrupted or error-free operation
• We are not responsible for third-party services, links, or content
• Data loss or service interruptions may occur; backup your important data
• We do not guarantee fanmark availability or permanence

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification
indemnification.content:
You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless fanmark.id and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from:

• Your use of the Service
• Your violation of these Terms
• Your violation of third-party rights
• Your user-generated content

suspensionTermination.title: 11. Suspension and Termination
suspensionTermination.content:
We may suspend or terminate your account if you:

• Violate these Terms
• Engage in illegal or fraudulent activity
• Harass other users
• Create objectionable content
• Violate intellectual property rights
• Fail to pay fees

Termination may be immediate without notice for serious violations.

governing.title: 12. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction where fanmark.id operates, without regard to conflict of law principles.

disputeResolution.title: 13. Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.content:
Any disputes shall be resolved through:

• Good Faith Negotiation: First, parties will attempt to resolve disputes through discussion
• Mediation: If negotiation fails, disputes may be submitted to mediation
• Arbitration/Litigation: If mediation fails, disputes shall be resolved through arbitration or court proceedings as applicable by law

changes.title: 14. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated through email or prominent notification on the Service. Continued use after changes indicates acceptance of the updated Terms.

severability.title: 15. Severability
severability.content: If any provision of these Terms is found invalid, that provision will be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid, or removed if necessary. The remaining provisions will continue in effect.

entireAgreement.title: 16. Entire Agreement
entireAgreement.content: These Terms, along with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and fanmark.id regarding your use of the Service.

serviceTermination.title: 17. Service Termination and Discontinuation
serviceTermination.content:
Service Discontinuation: We may discontinue or materially modify the Service at any time. We will provide at least 180 days' prior written notice to all active users if we discontinue the Service.

Notice and License Guarantee: Upon issuing discontinuation notice:
• All current license holders will be guaranteed the right to extend/renew their licenses at least once more (up to the maximum extension period permitted under their tier) without additional charge, provided they request renewal before the original expiration date
• No further extensions will be possible after the final license expiration date, which must fall before or on the Service discontinuation date
• Users will have until the final license expiration date to export all data and content

User Data: Upon Service termination, we will:
• Provide a reasonable opportunity (at least 60 days from license expiration) for you to retrieve or export your data and content
• Make reasonable efforts to facilitate data export in a standard, portable format
• Retain your data according to applicable laws and our Privacy Policy

Financial Matters: Upon Service termination:
• We will refund prorated license fees for any paid licenses that were renewed after discontinuation notice was issued (if legally required in your jurisdiction)
• Users will not be entitled to damages or compensation beyond such refunds
• All refund requests must be made within 12 months of Service termination

No Liability: We are not liable for any loss of data, business, profits, or opportunities resulting from Service discontinuation, provided we follow the notice, extension guarantee, and data export procedures outlined above. By accepting these Terms, you acknowledge that continued reliance on the Service after the discontinuation notice period ends is at your own risk.

contactUs.title: 18. Contact Us
contactUs.content:
If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

Email: legal@fanmark.id

about.title: About Fanmark
about.subtitle: Creating a New Form of Identity with Emoji
about.introduction: Fanmark is a next-generation ID and link service using emoji combinations (fanmarks). Get your own special, memorable, and easy-to-share address.

memorable.title: Memorable
memorable.description: No need to remember complex URLs or strings of numbers. Just choose emojis that represent you, and you'll have a unique, instantly recognizable ID.

easyShare.title: Easy to Share
easyShare.description: Share emojis directly on social media and messaging apps. They're visually appealing and anyone can access your page right away.

flexible.title: Flexible Usage
flexible.description: Use it as a profile page, redirect to your favorite site, or display messages. Customize it freely to suit your needs.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Available in Japanese, English, Korean, and Indonesian. Connect with people around the world.

step1.title: Search for Fanmarks
step1.description: Combine 1-5 emojis to search for your ideal fanmark. Check availability and pricing.

step2.title: Claim Your Fanmark
step2.description: Found a fanmark you like? Create an account and claim it. As we're invite-only, you'll need an invitation code or to join the waitlist.

step3.title: Customize Settings
step3.description: Set the display name and access type (profile, redirect, text) for your fanmark. Creating a profile page is easy.

step4.title: Share and Enjoy
step4.description: Share your fanmark on social media or your website. Your unique, easily accessible link is ready to go.

creators.title: Creators
creators.description: Share links to your work or portfolio with emojis that represent your brand.

businesses.title: Shops & Businesses
businesses.description: Create pathways to menus or booking pages with emojis that express your shop's personality.

communities.title: Communities
communities.description: Link to event information or member recruitment pages with emojis that reflect your group's vibe.

cta.title: Let's Get Started
cta.description: Find your special fanmark and experience a new world of identity.

commercialTransactions.title: Commercial Transactions Act Disclosure
commercialTransactions.introduction: In accordance with the Commercial Transactions Act, we disclose the following information.

businessOperator.title: 1. Business Operator Name
businessOperator.content:
Fanmark ID

Operating Company: [Company Name]
Representative: [Representative Name]

servicePricing.title: 2. Product/Service Pricing
servicePricing.content:
・4+ emoji combination: Free
・2-3 emoji combination: $9.99 (tax included)
・1 emoji: $99.9 (tax included)

※All displayed prices include tax.
※Yen conversion rates may vary with exchange rates.

paymentMethod.title: 3. Payment Methods
paymentMethod.content:
Credit Card Payment (via Stripe)
Supported Cards: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, JCB, etc.

paymentTiming.title: 4. Payment Timing
paymentTiming.content:
Payment is completed at the time of service application.
Credit card withdrawal timing follows each card company's terms.

serviceProvision.title: 5. Service Provision Timing
serviceProvision.content: Service is available immediately after payment completion.

cancellationPolicy.title: 6. Returns/Cancellation Policy
cancellationPolicy.content:
Due to the nature of digital content, returns and cancellations are generally not accepted.

However, refunds will be provided in the following cases:
・Service has critical defects
・Breach of contract due to operator's responsibility

For refund requests, please contact us via the inquiry form or email.

refundPolicy.title: 7. Refund Policy
refundPolicy.content:
If a refund is approved, it will be processed using the same payment method.
Refund processing may take 5-10 business days after approval.

contactInformation.title: 8. Contact Information
contactInformation.content:
For questions or inquiries, please contact us at:

Email: legal@fanmark.id
Contact Form: fanmark.id/contact

※We will respond to inquiries within 2-3 business days.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.subtitle: Get in touch with us for questions, feedback, or support
contactUs.introduction: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have questions about fanmark.id, feedback to share, or need support, please reach out using one of the methods below.

email.title: Email
email.description: For general inquiries, legal matters, or support requests, send us an email.

twitter.title: Twitter/X
twitter.description: Follow us on Twitter/X for updates, announcements, and quick support responses.
